content.full_text:
Assembly
California Legislature

GERALD N. FELANDO
ASSEMBLYMAN
FIFTY-FIRST DISTRICT
P.O. BOX 4198
TORRANCE, CALIFORNIA 90510

January 30, 1990

Fair Political Practices Commission
Attention: John Wallace
428 J Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, California 95804

Dear Mr. Wallace:

This is to request written confirmation of an oral opinion which was rendered on January 29, 1990.

The original question was as follows: If one member of the Legislature lists a loan on his campaign statement and the second member (to whom the loan was given) lists it inadvertently as a contribution, how can the second member repay the loan.

The response was as follows: Provided that the first member did, in fact, list the amount as a loan on his original campaign statement, the second member can file an amended statement (form 405) listing the contribution as a loan (with a letter of explanation attached) and then may proceed to repay the loan.

Please feel free to contact me at 5-7906 if you have any questions or comments. In addition, we would be happy to pick up this opinion at your office when it is ready. Thank you for your immediate attention to this matter.

Sincerely,

[signature]
GERALD N. FELANDO

This is a telecopier cover sheet from Assemblyman Gerald N. Felando. The form is titled "TELECOPIER COVER SHEET" and includes the following details:

QUIPPED FROM:
- Capitol Office:
  - Phone Number ATSS: 8-485-7906
  - PUBLIC: 916-445-7906
  - Quip Phone Number ATSS: 8-485-7344
- District Office:
  - Phone Number ATSS: 8-674-4105
  - PUBLIC: 213-540-2123
  - Quip Phone Number ATSS: 8-213-516-4117

TO: John Wallace
DATE: 1-30-90
TIME: 10:00 AM
FROM: Gerald D. Felando
TOTAL NUMBER OF PAGES (Incl. Cover Sheet): 2
SUBJECT OF TELECOPY: [blank]
COMMENTS: [blank]
PLEASE CALL TO CONFIRM RECEIPT OF TELECOPY
OFFICE MARKED ABOVE: ___YES ___NO
